Index.title: Secure European Web Tools
Index.description: Powerful browser-based apps running completely online. Fast, private, and fully encrypted.
Index.pdfMergeDesc: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document entirely in your browser.
Index.videoEditorDesc: Trim, cut, and enhance videos directly in your browser.
Index.splitPdfDesc: Extract specific pages or separate your PDF into multiple files.
Index.pdfToImageDesc: Convert PDF pages into high-quality JPG images instantly.
Index.protectPdfDesc: Encrypt your PDF with a password or remove existing protection.
Index.metadataCleanerDesc: Remove EXIF, GPS, and device metadata from images for absolute privacy.
Index.qrGeneratorDesc: Create private, static QR codes without tracking redirects or logging.
Index.hashVerifierDesc: Verify file integrity with SHA-256 or MD5 hashes entirely locally.
Index.textEncryptorDesc: Secure text with AES-256 GCM encryption and download as a .vollu file.
Index.svgOptimizerDesc: Compress and clean SVG vectors for high-performance web usage.
Index.colorExtractorDesc: Generate professional color palettes instantly from any image inspiration.
Index.techConverterDesc: High-precision unit converter for developers. PX/REM and Binary/Decimal data scales.
Index.faviconGeneratorDesc: Create complete favicon packages for Web, iOS, and Android from any image.
Index.audioExtractorDesc: Extract high-quality MP3 audio from your videos 100% in-browser.
Index.volumeBoosterDesc: Increase volume and normalize audio for videos and music with zero quality loss.
Index.videoToGifDesc: Convert video clips to high-quality GIFs with professional palette algorithms.
Index.mp3CutterDesc: Precision-cut audio files with millisecond accuracy and real-time waveform visualization.
Index.audioConverterDesc: Batch conversion between MP3, WAV, and OGG with full bitrate control.
Index.smartCompressorDesc: Optimize PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, and SVG images with no visible quality loss.
Index.imageConverterDesc: Convert photos to next-gen formats: WebP and AVIF with 100% privacy.
Index.fileArmorDesc: Military-grade AES-GCM 256 encryption for files of any size, processed entirely in-browser.
Index.backgroundRemoverDesc: Powerful client-side IA to remove backgrounds from images instantly.
Index.dnsCheckerDesc: Check DNS records across multiple global servers to detect propagation issues.
Index.visualMtrDesc: Combine Traceroute and Ping to diagnose latency and packet loss issues.

ColorExtractor.title: Color Palette Extractor
ColorExtractor.description: Extract stunning color palettes from any image instantly and locally.
ColorExtractor.analysisDesc1: This image is being processed entirely in your browser using the Vibrant engine.
ColorExtractor.analysisDesc2: Colors are extracted in milliseconds without ever sending data to the cloud.

Legal.termsIntro: By using VOLLU.app, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
Legal.liabilityText: VOLLU.app is provided 'AS IS' without any warranties. We are not responsible for any data loss, file damage, or indirect consequences arising from the use of our tools. User assumes all risks associated with file processing.
Legal.privacyIntro: Your privacy is our core promise. We believe in radical privacy for all users.
Legal.dataHandlingText: No files are ever uploaded to our servers. All processing (merging, editing, converting) happens entirely in your browser using WebAssembly technology. Your data stays on your device.
Legal.useOfServiceText: VOLLU.app provides browser-based tools for personal and professional use. You agree to use these tools in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations.
Legal.performanceText: Since all processing is client-side, performance is dependent on your device specifications. VOLLU does not guarantee specific processing speeds.
Legal.noTrackingText: VOLLU.app does not use tracking cookies. We use Umami (a self-hosted, privacy-focused analytics tool) to gather anonymous usage data without identifying individual users.
Legal.zeroUploadText: Our technology is built on WebAssembly. This allows the PDF conversion and video editing engines to run directly in your browser. We never see your files, we never store your data, and we never share your information.

AudioExtractor.processingStatus: Processing high-fidelity discrete cosine transforms... Your browser is now a professional workstation.
AudioExtractor.idleStatus: Extract audio tracks with professional LAME encoding quality. 100% Client-Side. High Privacy.

VolumeBooster.processDesc2: Rescue low-volume recordings. Boost audio levels and apply smart normalization 100% locally.

VisualMtr.simulatedNote: Note: This diagnosis is performed via global HTTP/HTTPS probes from your browser to identify latency across major CDNs and Gateways.
